task_completion.description: Verify that a new immunization/drug lot record has been initiated for the Influenza Vaccine or NDC 49281-0421-50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or inventory page is open showing a new entry for 'Influenza Vaccine' or NDC '49281-0421-50'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct lot number is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FL2024-8847' is visible in the Lot Number field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct manufacturer is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Sanofi Pasteur' is selected or typed in the Manufacturer field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct expiration date is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '2025-06-30' (or a visually equivalent date format like 06/30/2025) is visible in the Expiration Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct quantity of doses is recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '50' is visible in the Quantity, Doses, or Initial Amount field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new lot record was successfully saved or created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Record saved', 'Lot added'), the completed record appearing in the inventory list, or the agent clicking the 'Save'/'Submit' button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the inventory/medical software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or desktop application with standard UI elements (buttons, form fields, menus) being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual inventory system and not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into specific, labeled form fields of an inventory or electronic health record (EHR) system, not just typed into Notepad or a generic text document.

integrity.description: Verify the results come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a logical progression of navigating to the inventory section, opening the 'add lot' form, and filling out the fields.
